steps.description: Base URL used to build provider callback URLs.
Route prefix used to register OAuth login and callback routes.
Optional comma-separated list of providers to enable.
Optional frontend redirect URL used after the JWT is signed.
Query parameter name used when oauth.redirect-on-success is enabled.
Base URL used to build provider callback URLs. In production use your public domain (e.g. https://api.myapp.com)
Route prefix used to register OAuth login and callback routes
Optional comma-separated list of providers to enable (google,github,gitlab). When empty, providers with complete credentials are enabled automatically
Optional frontend URL used for browser redirect mode after the JWT is signed (for example https://app.myapp.com/auth/done). Leave empty to return JSON {"token":"..."}
Query parameter name used when OAUTH_REDIRECT_ON_SUCCESS is enabled

steps.message:
Next step for OAuth projects: expose a protected profile route with the JWT provider.

protected := app.Group("/api", jwtProvider.Middleware())
claims, ok := jwt.ClaimsFromCtx(c.Ctx)
httpx.GET("/me", handler).WithSecured("bearerAuth")

Reference: ss-keel-examples/examples/12-oauth
